rootCause: Old/default runtime output intentionally has no enrichedAnalysis shadow metadata.
Quality audit diagnostics previously collapsed historical, extension, and synthetic missing enrichment into one broad unenriched_levels_present diagnostic.
Runtime projection mapping did not explicitly prefer exact level ID matches before price/source/timeframe fallback.
fixSummary: Exact ID-first enrichment mapping added before normalized price/source/timeframe fallback.
Runtime enrichment diagnostics now classify historical, extension, and synthetic unmatched zones.
LevelQualityAuditReport now exposes an additive enrichmentBreakdown.
Specific diagnostics distinguish unenriched_historical_levels_present, unenriched_extension_levels_present, and unenriched_synthetic_levels_present.
Synthetic continuation-map rows remain unenriched by design and stay marked as forward-planning context.
